overall.description: A high-quality game engine rendering of a cozy medieval fantasy tavern interior with stone walls, wooden beams, and warm firelight. The scene features a ghostly apparition and several NPCs in a static first-person view with slight camera sway.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern common room with central fireplace

character entering through the doorway and walking toward the seating area

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and wooden mantelpiece
arched wooden support beams across the vaulted ceiling
green ivy hanging from the upper walls and ceiling
large circular woven rug covering the wooden floor
dark leather upholstered sofa with wooden frame
tall brass floor lamp with glowing shade

segments.scene_description: The camera observes a cozy medieval tavern interior dominated by a stone fireplace on the left. A translucent ghostly figure stands near the hearth while warm firelight illuminates the wooden beams and furniture. At around 12 seconds, a character enters from the right doorway, adding movement to the otherwise still scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady gaze within a cozy medieval tavern that shifts from a moment of ghostly stillness to a scene of lived-in activity. It begins by focusing on a stone fireplace where a translucent ghostly figure stands motionless amidst the warm glow of firelight reflecting off wooden beams and rustic furniture. As the camera maintains its position, the quiet atmosphere is interrupted when a character enters through the doorway on the right. The scene then expands in energy as this new movement breaks the static tension of the room, blending the supernatural presence of the apparition with the mundane arrival of a guest.
